content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Found 3 correctness regressions in the nearby-work rollout: project creation now hard-depends on `br list`, legacy canonical prompt overrides are no longer accepted at this entry point, and prompt review has no valid repair path for drifted contract prompts missing `Nearby work`.

## Amendments

1. finding_summary: `project create-from-bead` now aborts on any `br list` failure instead of falling back to the focal bead's already-loaded dependency/dependent metadata. `execute_create_from_bead_in_dir` unconditionally propagates `load_bead_summaries(current_dir).await?` before building the pre-existing upstream/downstream sections, so a transient summary lookup failure now prevents project creation entirely. affected_files: `src/cli/project.rs:416-426`. remediation_hint: Keep nearby-work hydration best-effort and preserve the old fallback path for upstream/dependent context when `br list` cannot be loaded.
   Rationale: This bead was supposed to extend prompt context, not make bead-backed project creation unavailable whenever summary hydration fails.
2. finding_summary: Contract-marked prompt overrides from the existing v1 shape are now rejected outright. `create_project_from_bead_context` switched to `validate_current_canonical_prompt_shape`, even though `validate_canonical_prompt_shape` still explicitly accepts legacy prompts without `## Nearby work`, so any saved canonical override produced before this bead now fails project creation. affected_files: `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs:427-443`, `src/contexts/project_run_record/task_prompt_contract.rs:405-413`. remediation_hint: Continue accepting legacy v1 overrides here, and only enforce exact nearby-work matching when the override already contains that section or the caller is explicitly modernizing it.
   Rationale: The rest of the branch added explicit compatibility paths for legacy contract prompts; this entry point now breaks that compatibility for existing override files.
3. finding_summary: Prompt review cannot successfully repair a contract-marked prompt that has drifted and lost `## Nearby work`. For any original prompt that is not a fully valid legacy v1 prompt, `canonical_contract_drift_concerns` requires the refinement to satisfy `validate_current_canonical_prompt_shape` (so `Nearby work` must be present), but the later `original_nearby_work.is_none()` check then rejects any refined prompt that adds the section. affected_files: `src/contexts/workflow_composition/prompt_review.rs:333-370`. remediation_hint: If the original prompt has no graph-derived nearby section, allow a legacy-v1 repair path or only forbid rewriting an existing nearby-work body, not adding one during repair.
   Rationale: This creates an unsatisfiable prompt-review loop for drifted contract prompts that the surrounding guidance still claims to support.
